work_unit: storage.ts loadSettings 浅合并→三层 nested merge (SH-M-001)
situation: audit-2026-07-01-005 finding SH-M-001：loadSettings 用 {...DEFAULT_SETTINGS, ...stored} 浅合并 AppSettings。AppSettings 含 vision/counter/detectionParams 三个嵌套对象，若 chrome.storage.local 里只存了部分字段（如仅 vision.apiKey），浅合并会用存储里的整个 vision 对象覆盖默认值，丢失 baseUrl/model/disableThinking 等未存字段。用户升级版本新增字段时尤为明显。
action: 新增 deepMergeSettings 辅助函数：顶层 spread DEFAULT_SETTINGS + stored，再对 vision/counter/detectionParams 三个已知嵌套对象分别做二层 spread 合并；其他顶层标量字段（detectionMethod/segmentationModel）保持覆盖语义。改动限于 src/shared/storage.ts 单文件，类型检查通过（npx tsc --noEmit 无错）。
outcome_evidence: commit 5ae7516 pushed to origin/auto/opt-shizi-1782906261; npx tsc --noEmit 在 shizi 项目根无 storage.ts 相关报错；opt-worktree.sh 复用同 area worktree (route-fix)，未触发 direction-shift（storage.ts 不在 .claude/public-interfaces.txt）。
next_suggestion: 派生 SH-M-004 (priority 4): background/index.ts runPipeline handler saveHistoryItem try/catch 降级 console.warn
派生 SH-M-002+SH-M-003 (priority 5): ocr-internal.ts callOcr + segmentation.ts getModelBuffer fetch timeout+retry

audit_findings.finding: loadSettings 浅合并 AppSettings，嵌套对象（vision/counter/detectionParams）被整体覆盖，新增字段或旧存储缺字段时丢默认值
audit_findings.remediation: deepMergeSettings 对三个已知嵌套对象做二层 spread 合并
